chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.S-97 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.342/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.343/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02-5-2025 None present for the petitioner, nor has any intimation been received. However, perusal of record reflects that the petitioner has already approached the Court of the Additional Sessions Judge-III/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur where learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace in para No.4 of the order dated 19-3-2025, passed in Cr. Misc. Application No.714/2025, has observed as under:- “As, the petitioner and respondents No.01 & 02 are at feud over a plot, situated at Madina Colony Khairpur, however, the petitioner is trying to build up pressure upon private respondents by using the shoulders of this Court, otherwise, as per statements of official respondents, no harassment had been caused to petitioner, hence in view of above, the instant CMA stands dismissed being meritless however, the petitioner is at liberty to invoke proper forum, if so desires. Order accordingly.” Since, there is private dispute in between the parties over a plot, the same has to be decided by the competent Civil Court. Accordingly, the instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the Civil Court, in accordance with law, for redressal of his grievance. J U D G E Naveed Ali
